title: pityrogramma flexilis
intro: Pityrogramma flexilis, also known as the flexible fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Pityrogramma flexilis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
